clusters.justification: These terms map onto macroscopic salience and limbic networks, which orchestrate broad physiological arousal, emotional valence, and autonomic reactivity to salient stimuli.
This cluster reflects cortico-striatal and mesolimbic circuitry underlying the calculation of expected outcomes, incentive-based motivation, and goal-directed economic behavior.
These concepts share co-activation within the Default Mode Network, which supports internally constructed, abstract representations of the self, personal narratives, and other social agents.
